title: delphinium grandiflorum var. obtusilobum
intro: Delphinium grandiflorum var. obtusilobum, also known as Chinese delphinium, is a flowering plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Delphinium grandiflorum var. obtusilobum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms of fever. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
